==дЄЩе≠РгБЃжЬИ== и•њжЪ¶еєігБЃдЄЛ1ж°БгБМ4гГї9пЉИеНБеє≤гБМ[[зФ≤]]гГї[[еЈ±]]пЉЙгБЃеєігБЃ[[11жЬИ]]гБМдЄЩе≠РгБЃ[[жЬИ (жЪ¶)|жЬИ]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВгБЯгБ†гБЧгБУгБУгБІгБДгБЖжЬИгБѓгАБ[[жЧІжЪ¶]]гБЃжЬИгВД[[зѓАжЬИ]]пЉИ[[е§ІйЫ™]]гБЛгВЙ[[е∞ПеѓТ]]гБЃеЙНжЧ•гБЊгБІпЉЙгВТйБ©зФ®гБЩгВЛе†іеРИгВВгБВгВЛгАВ
==дЄЩе≠РгБЃжЧ•== дЄЩе≠РгБЃжЧ•гБЃ[[йБЄжЧ•]]гБѓдї•дЄЛгБЃйАЪгВКгАВ ===йБЄжЧ•=== дЄЩе≠РгБЃжЧ•гБѓ[[зКѓеЬЯ|е§ІеЬЯ]]гБЃ7жЧ•зЫЃпЉИжЬАзµВжЧ•пЉЙгБІгБВгВЛгАВ ==йЦҐйА£й†ЕзЫЃ== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[ja:дЄЩе≠Р]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''дЄЩе≠Р'''пЉИгБ≤гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЄгБДгБЛгБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЄгБДгБЛгБЃгБ≠гАБгБЄгБДгБЧпЉЙгБѓгАБ[[Sexagenary cycle]]гБЃдЄАгБ§гАВ
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveгБЃзµДгБњеРИгВПгБЫгБЃ13зХ™зЫЃгБІгАБеЙНгБѓ[[дєЩдЇ•]]гАБжђ°гБѓ[[дЄБдЄС]]гБІгБВгВЛгАВ[[йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М]]гБІгБѓгАБ[[еНБеє≤]]гБЃ[[дЄЩ]]гБѓйЩљгБЃ[[зБЂ]]гАБ[[еНБдЇМжФѓ]]гБЃ[[е≠Р (еНБдЇМжФѓ)|е≠Р]]гБѓйЩљгБЃ[[ж∞і]]гБІгАБ[[дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|зЫЄеЙЛ]]пЉИж∞іеЙЛзБЂпЉЙгБІгБВгВЛгАВ
==дЄЩе≠РгБЃеєі== [[и•њжЪ¶]]еєігВТ60гБІеЙ≤гБ£гБ¶16гБМдљЩгВЛеєігБМдЄЩе≠РгБЃ[[еєі]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВ {| class="wikitable" |+'''дЄЩе≠РгБЃеєі''' |- ![[1еНГеєізіА]]!![[2еНГеєізіА]]!![[3еНГеєізіА]] |- | *[[16еєі]] *[[76еєі]] *[[136еєі]] *[[196еєі]] *[[256еєі]] *[[316еєі]] *[[376еєі]] *[[436еєі]] *[[496еєі]] *[[556еєі]] *[[616еєі]] *[[676еєі]] *[[736еєі]] *[[796еєі]] *[[856еєі]] *[[916еєі]] *[[976еєі]] | *[[1036еєі]] *[[1096еєі]] *[[1156еєі]] *[[1216еєі]] *[[1276еєі]] *[[1336еєі]] *[[1396еєі]] *[[1456еєі]] *[[1516еєі]] *[[1576еєі]] *[[1636еєі]] *[[1696еєі]] *[[1756еєі]] *[[1816еєі]] *[[1876еєі]] *[[1936еєі]] *[[1996еєі]] | *[[2056еєі]] *[[2116еєі]] *[[2176еєі]] *[[2236еєі]] *[[2296еєі]] *[[2356еєі]] *[[2416еєі]] *[[2476еєі]] *[[2536еєі]] *[[2596еєі]] *[[2656еєі]] *[[2716еєі]] *[[2776еєі]] *[[2836еєі]] *[[2896еєі]] *[[2956еєі]] |}
==дЄЩе≠РгБЃжЬИ== и•њжЪ¶еєігБЃдЄЛ1ж°БгБМ4гГї9пЉИеНБеє≤гБМ[[зФ≤]]гГї[[еЈ±]]пЉЙгБЃеєігБЃ[[11жЬИ]]гБМдЄЩе≠РгБЃ[[жЬИ (жЪ¶)|жЬИ]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВгБЯгБ†гБЧгБУгБУгБІгБДгБЖжЬИгБѓгАБ[[жЧІжЪ¶]]гБЃжЬИгВД[[зѓАжЬИ]]пЉИ[[е§ІйЫ™]]гБЛгВЙ[[е∞ПеѓТ]]гБЃеЙНжЧ•гБЊгБІпЉЙгВТйБ©зФ®гБЩгВЛе†іеРИгВВгБВгВЛгАВ
==дЄЩе≠РгБЃжЧ•== дЄЩе≠РгБЃжЧ•гБЃ[[йБЄжЧ•]]гБѓдї•дЄЛгБЃйАЪгВКгАВ ===йБЄжЧ•=== дЄЩе≠РгБЃжЧ•гБѓ[[зКѓеЬЯ|е§ІеЬЯ]]гБЃ7жЧ•зЫЃпЉИжЬАзµВжЧ•пЉЙгБІгБВгВЛгАВ ==йЦҐйА£й†ЕзЫЃ== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:дЄЩе≠Р]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:дЄЩе≠Р]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:дЄЩе≠Р]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Fire Rat}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:дЄЩе≠Р]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Rat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Fire Rat]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Yang Fire Rat]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Rat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Rat]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Rat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Rat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yang Fire Rat]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[ja:Yang Fire Rat]]

еє≤жФѓгБЃзµДгБњеРИгВПгБЫгБЃ13зХ™зЫЃгБІгАБеЙНгБѓ[[дєЩдЇ•]]гАБжђ°гБѓ[[дЄБдЄС]]гБІгБВгВЛгАВ[[йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М]]гБІгБѓгАБ[[еНБеє≤]]гБЃ[[дЄЩ]]гБѓйЩљгБЃ[[зБЂ]]гАБ[[еНБдЇМжФѓ]]гБЃ[[е≠Р (еНБдЇМжФѓ)|е≠Р]]гБѓйЩљгБЃ[[ж∞і]]гБІгАБ[[дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|зЫЄеЙЛ]]пЉИж∞іеЙЛзБЂпЉЙгБІгБВгВЛгАВ

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:BƒЂng-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Feuer-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de feu]][[hak:Pi√°ng-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:дЄЩе≠Р]][[ko:л≥СмЮР]][[nds:F√Љ√Љr-R√ґtt]][[vi:B√≠nh T√љ]][[za:Bingjceij]][[zh_min_nan:P√©ng-ch√Ї]][[zh_yue:дЄЩе≠Р]][[zh:дЄЩе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062017]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Rat|kanji=дЄЩе≠Р|romaji=hinoe nezumi|onyomi=heishi|p=b«Рngz«Р|w=ping-tz≈≠|mi=p ∞i≈Л¬≤¬є ts…®|y=bing2 zi2|j=bing2 zi2|ci=p…™≈Л tsi|mc=p√¶≈Л tЌ°si|oc-bs=pra≈Л tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Rat (дЄЩе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): b«Рngz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: heishi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongja (л≥СмЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): B√≠nh T√љ
<!-- == * Yang Fire Rat (дЄЩе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): b«Рngz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): beng2 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: гБ≤гБЃгБИгБ≠ (hinoe-ne) ***Onyomi: гБЄгБДгБЛгБЃгБ≠ (heika-no-ne) ***Onyomi: гБЄгБДгБЧ (heishi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): byeongja ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): B√≠nh T√љ
--> ==Years of Yang Fire Rat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 16 when divided by 60 is a Besshi [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Besshi (дЄЩе≠РгБЃеєі)''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Fire Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the Besshi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Rat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows. ===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)=== Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the Besshi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Rat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows. ===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)=== Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yang Fire Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the Besshi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Rat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows. ===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)=== Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the Besshi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Rat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows. ===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)=== Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yang Fire Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the Besshi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Rat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows. ===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)=== Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yang Fire Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the Besshi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Rat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows. ===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)=== Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:BƒЂng-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Feuer-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de feu]][[hak:Pi√°ng-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:дЄЩе≠Р]][[ko:л≥СмЮР]][[nds:F√Љ√Љr-R√ґtt]][[vi:B√≠nh T√љ]][[za:Bingjceij]][[zh-min-nan:P√©ng-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:дЄЩе≠Р]][[zh:дЄЩе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062017]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Rat|kanji=дЄЩе≠Р|romaji=hinoe nezumi|onyomi=heishi|p=b«Рngz«Р|w=ping-tz≈≠|mi=p ∞i≈Л¬≤¬є ts…®|y=bing2 zi2|j=bing2 zi2|ci=p…™≈Л tsi|mc=p√¶≈Л tЌ°si|oc-bs=pra≈Л tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Rat (дЄЩе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): b«Рngz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: heishi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongja (л≥СмЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): B√≠nh T√љ
<!-- == * Yang Fire Rat (дЄЩе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): b«Рngz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): beng2 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: гБ≤гБЃгБИгБ≠ (hinoe-ne) ***Onyomi: гБЄгБДгБЛгБЃгБ≠ (heika-no-ne) ***Onyomi: гБЄгБДгБЧ (heishi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): byeongja ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): B√≠nh T√љ
--> ==Years of Yang Fire Rat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 16 when divided by 60 is a Besshi [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Besshi (дЄЩе≠РгБЃеєі)''' |- ! <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:BƒЂng-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Feuer-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de feu]][[hak:Pi√°ng-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:дЄЩе≠Р]][[ko:л≥СмЮР]][[nds:F√Љ√Љr-R√ґtt]][[vi:B√≠nh T√љ]][[za:Bingjceij]][[zh-min-nan:P√©ng-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:дЄЩе≠Р]][[zh:дЄЩе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062017]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Rat|kanji=дЄЩе≠Р|romaji=hinoe nezumi|onyomi=heishi|p=b«Рngz«Р|w=ping-tz≈≠|mi=p ∞i≈Л¬≤¬є ts…®|y=bing2 zi2|j=bing2 zi2|ci=p…™≈Л tsi|mc=p√¶≈Л tЌ°si|oc-bs=pra≈Л tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Rat (дЄЩе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): b«Рngz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: heishi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongja (л≥СмЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): B√≠nh T√љ

--> ==Years of Yang Fire Rat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 16 when divided by 60 is a Besshi [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Besshi (дЄЩе≠РгБЃеєі)''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Fire Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the Besshi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Rat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows. ===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)=== Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yang Fire Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the Besshi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Rat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows. ===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)=== Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:BƒЂng-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Feuer-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de feu]][[hak:Pi√°ng-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:дЄЩе≠Р]][[ko:л≥СмЮР]][[nds:F√Љ√Љr-R√ґtt]][[vi:B√≠nh T√љ]][[za:Bingjceij]][[zh-min-nan:P√©ng-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:дЄЩе≠Р]][[zh:дЄЩе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062017]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Rat|kanji=дЄЩе≠Р|romaji=hinoe nezumi|onyomi=heishi|p=b«Рngz«Р|w=ping-tz≈≠|mi=p ∞i≈Л¬≤¬є ts…®|y=bing2 zi2|j=bing2 zi2|ci=p…™≈Л tsi|mc=p√¶≈Л tЌ°si|oc-bs=pra≈Л tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yang Fire Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the Besshi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Rat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows. ===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)=== Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yang Fire Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the Besshi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Rat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows. ===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)=== Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yang Fire Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the Besshi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Rat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows. ===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)=== Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Rat (дЄЩе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): b«Рngz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: heishi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongja (л≥СмЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): B√≠nh T√љ

==Months of Yang Fire Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the Besshi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Rat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows. ===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)=== Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yang Fire Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the Besshi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Rat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows. ===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)=== Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:BƒЂng-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Feuer-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de feu]][[hak:Pi√°ng-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:дЄЩе≠Р]][[ko:л≥СмЮР]][[nds:F√Љ√Љr-R√ґtt]][[vi:B√≠nh T√љ]][[za:Bingjceij]][[zh-min-nan:P√©ng-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:дЄЩе≠Р]][[zh:дЄЩе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062017]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Rat|kanji=дЄЩе≠Р|romaji=hinoe nezumi|onyomi=heishi|p=b«Рngz«Р|w=ping-tz≈≠|mi=p ∞i≈Л¬≤¬є ts…®|y=bing2 zi2|j=bing2 zi2|ci=p…™≈Л tsi|mc=p√¶≈Л tЌ°si|oc-bs=pra≈Л tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Rat (дЄЩе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): b«Рngz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: heishi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongja (л≥СмЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): B√≠nh T√љ

==Months of Yang Fire Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the Besshi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daisetsu]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
