==Months of Yang Fire Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November}} is designated as the Besshi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daisetsu}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Rat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows.
===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)===
Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yang Fire Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November}} is designated as the Besshi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daisetsu}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Rat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows.
===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)===
Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Rat|kanji=дЄЩе≠Р|romaji=hinoe nezumi|onyomi=heishi|p=b«Рngz«Р|w=ping-tz≈≠|mi=p ∞i≈Л¬≤¬є ts…®|y=bing2 zi2|j=bing2 zi2|ci=p…™≈Л tsi|mc=p√¶≈Л tЌ°si|oc-bs=pra≈Л tsi|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat}} represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yang Fire Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November}} is designated as the Besshi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daisetsu}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Rat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows.
===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)===
Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Rat|kanji=дЄЩе≠Р|romaji=hinoe nezumi|onyomi=heishi|p=b«Рngz«Р|w=ping-tz≈≠|mi=p ∞i≈Л¬≤¬є ts…®|y=bing2 zi2|j=bing2 zi2|ci=p…™≈Л tsi|mc=p√¶≈Л tЌ°si|oc-bs=pra≈Л tsi|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat}} represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Rat|kanji=дЄЩе≠Р|romaji=hinoe nezumi|onyomi=heishi|p=b«Рngz«Р|w=ping-tz≈≠|mi=p ∞i≈Л¬≤¬є ts…®|y=bing2 zi2|j=bing2 zi2|ci=p…™≈Л tsi|mc=p√¶≈Л tЌ°si|oc-bs=pra≈Л tsi|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat|1=Rat (zodiac)}} represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

==Pronunciation==

** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongja (л≥СмЮР)
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): B√≠nh T√љ

==Years of Yang Fire Rat==

==Months of Yang Fire Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is designated as the Besshi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daisetsu|1=Daxue (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Xiaohan}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Rat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows.
===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)===
Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat|1=Rat (zodiac)}} represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yang Fire Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is designated as the Besshi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daisetsu|1=Daxue (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Xiaohan}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Rat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows.
===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)===
Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat|1=Rat (zodiac)}} represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yang Fire Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is designated as the Besshi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daisetsu|1=Daxue (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Xiaohan}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Rat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows.
===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)===
Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat|1=Rat (zodiac)}} represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yang Fire Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is designated as the Besshi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daisetsu|1=Daxue (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Xiaohan}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Rat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows.
===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)===
Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.
